hooks.command: powershell -Command "$envFile = $env:TRAE_ENV_FILE; if ($envFile) { 'AGENT_PORT=3010' | Out-File -FilePath $envFile -Encoding utf8 -Append; 'TEST_ENTRY=0' | Out-File -FilePath $envFile -Encoding utf8 -Append; Write-Host '[Hook] SessionStart: AGENT_PORT=3010 injected' }"

powershell -Command "$input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $obj = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $obj.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match 'pytest\s' -or $cmd -match 'python\s+-m\s+pytest') { Write-Error '[Hook BLOCKED] Direct pytest forbidden. Use: python d:\filework\test.py'; exit 2 }; if ($cmd -match '^curl\s+' -and $cmd -notmatch 'curl\.exe') { Write-Error '[Hook BLOCKED] PowerShell curl alias forbidden. Use curl.exe or Invoke-RestMethod'; exit 2 }; exit 0"

powershell -Command "$input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $obj = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $msg = $obj.stop_reason; if ($msg -match 'no changes|nothing to') { exit 0 }; $repo = 'd:\filework\excel-to-diagram'; $dirty = (git -C $repo status --porcelain 2>$null); if ($dirty) { Write-Error '[Hook] Working tree has uncommitted changes. Consider committing before stopping.'; exit 2 }; exit 0"
